title: Auditions
intro: We'd love to see you audition. Below are the shows currently casting, plus how auditions work for Stories on Stage. New to PYT? Everyone is welcome — no experience required.
no_open_message: There are no Mainstage auditions open right now. Check back soon, or explore Stories on Stage below.
sos_blurb: Our Stories on Stage season is cast from a single annual audition. Productions are short and often tour to local schools. Visit the Stories on Stage page for this year's audition details.
casting_body: We cast with care, fairness, and an eye for growth. Auditioning should be a welcoming experience, not a stressful one — every young performer is considered for the role where they'll thrive. Read more about how we approach casting and what to expect on the day.

faqs.question: Do I need experience to audition?
faqs.answer: No. We welcome first-time auditioners alongside returning performers. Come as you are.

faqs.question: What should I prepare?
faqs.answer: It varies by show. Each show's audition sign-up page lists exactly what to prepare. When in doubt, just bring yourself and a willingness to try.

faqs.question: How do I sign up?
faqs.answer: Use the "Sign up to audition" button on the show you're interested in above. It will take you to our sign-up page where you can pick a slot.
